alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide (IAM, Sigma) at 25°C for 30 min.
cleavage agent: using sequencing-grade modified porcine trypsin (Promega) at a protein-to-trypsin ratio of 20:1.
fragmentation method: the 20 most abundant precursor ions were selected for fragmentation using data-dependent MS/MS scans following each MS scan.
instrument: analyzed using a 2D linear ion trap mass spectrometer (Orbitrap Elite ETD; Thermo Fisher)
ionization type: The electrospray voltage was set to 2.0 kV
labeling: To analyze the changes induced by cetuximab treatment in HNSCC, we examined samples from 10 patients treated at Taipei Veterans General Hospital (TVGH).
reduction reagent: disulfide bonds were reduced using 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT, Merck) at 56°C for 45 min.
